def negative_package_exports_same_symbol_name_from_multiple_submodules_with_different_meanings():
    rule_id = "package_exports_same_symbol_name_from_multiple_submodules_with_different_meanings"
    family = "packaging"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag packages that reuse one exported name for unrelated implementations."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
